name: Windup Box
description: Delicate music box windup with charming nostalgia

prompts.SessionStart: music box mechanism ascending with bright spring-wound melody, music box chime, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: music box melody descending with smooth spring-wound decay, music box tone, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single bright music box note with satisfying spring-wound ring, music box chime, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct music box tick with crisp spring click, music box tone, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short music box note confirming with bright spring-wound ping, music box chime, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two music box notes with questioning rising spring-wound interval, music box chime, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady music box pulse with clear rhythmic spring-wound ticking, music box tone, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: music box melody splitting into two parallel spring-wound voices, music box sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear music box ping returning with distinct spring-wound ring, music box tone, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic music box burst with rapid spring-wound melodic attack, music box chime, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
